cREVTable.currentview: There are two core function in this script. The first is 'fillInData'. The data for the row is passed to this function and standard Revolution script can be used to place the data into the controls in the template group.

properties.name: Fields Description

cREVTable.currentview: This function provides a way to control the exact layout of row controls via script. It can be used to adjust the position of specific controls according to to the data being inserted.

properties.name: Fields Description
